## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run test` passes (coverage ≥ 80% on new code)
- [ ] `forge test` passes (if contracts changed)
- [ ] No server secrets reach the client bundle
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
